name: aido
description: Local API key rotation proxy for LLM providers

scripts.install:global: chmod +x aido && sudo cp aido /usr/local/bin/aido && sudo ln -sf aido /usr/local/bin/AIdo
scripts.install:systemd: chmod +x aido && mkdir -p ~/.config/systemd/user && AIDO_PATH="$(pwd)" USER="$(whoami)" sh -c 'sed -e "s|{AIDO_PATH}|${AIDO_PATH}|g" -e "s|{USER}|${USER}|g" contrib/aido.service.template > ~/.config/systemd/user/aido.service' && systemctl --user daemon-reload
scripts.uninstall:systemd: systemctl --user stop aido || true && rm -f ~/.config/systemd/user/aido.service && systemctl --user daemon-reload
